title: Original Dragon [cobblemon]
description: The true form of Kyurem, Reshiram, and Zekrom — the Original Dragon restored to Cobblemon.
body:
# 🌀 Original Dragon [Cobblemon] > **Credits:** > Concept art by [Cyberlord1109](https://www.newgrounds.com/art/view/cyberlord1109/my-take-on-the-original-dragon-b-w) > Licensed under [CC BY-NC 3.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/3.0/). > > Model and animations commissioned by me, created by the legendary Doctor X check his page here https://modrinth.com/user/Doctor_X. > > Datapack implentation wouldn't have been possible without Lvnatic the Goat check his page out here https://modrinth.com/user/Lvnatic > > releasing this addon just like all my others under [CC BY-NC-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/). Unite the forces of **truth and ideals** once again. This datapack introduces the *Original Dragon*, the primordial fusion of **Reshiram**, **Zekrom**, and **Kyurem**, now reborn in Cobblemon with animations, custom moves and abilities. ⚠️ **IMPORTANT:** - Requires **Mega Showdown** to function properly. - Must be installed in both the **datapack** and **resourcepack** folders. - **CHECK GALLERY FOR Supreme DNA Splicer Recipe, Doesn't show up in REI/JEI but will show up in crafting table menu!** ---
📥 Installation Instructions **Singleplayer:** - Place the `.zip` file into `/saves/[WORLDNAME]/datapacks` - Place the `.zip` into `/resourcepacks` - Enable in-game via `ESC → Options → Resource Packs` **Servers:** - Place the `.zip` into `/world/datapacks` - (Folder name may differ — e.g., `myworld` or custom) - If unsure, consult your host’s guide on adding datapacks. **Every Player** must also have the `.zip` installed as a **Resource Pack**. - Best practice: each player installs it manually. - You *can* use a server resource pack, but Cobblemon add-ons can be finicky with that.
---
⚔️ Base Stats & Typing **Name:** Original Dragon **Typing:** Dragon / Ice **Base Stats (BST 760):** - HP : 125 - Attack : 170 - Defense : 100 - Special Attack : 170 - Special Defense : 100 - Speed : 95
---
🌟 Abilities Custom/ No Custom **No Custom** * turboblaze * teravolt * h:pressure **Custom** - **Primal Resonance** – On entry, the user’s primal resonance echoes through the battlefield, empowering all Dragon-type moves by ×1.2. Each Dragon-type hit has a chance to inflict **burn**, **paralysis**, or **freeze** on the target. When struck, there’s also a small chance the user’s inner resonance surges, raising **all stats by 1**. - **Prime Fusion** – The primal energies converge to bless the user with +1 to every stat on entry. Dragon-type moves are amplified by ×1.3. The user is immune to **Fire**, **Electric**, and **Ice** attacks and passively heals ¹⁄₁₆ max HP each turn. - **Tao Reforged** – The Pokémon radiates unified elemental power. Fire, Electric, and Ice moves gain ×1.2 power. When hit by one of those types, the user gains a corresponding stat boost: • Fire → +1 Sp. Atk • Electric → +1 Speed • Ice → +1 Defense - **Tao Synthesis** – Upon entry, the Pokémon harmonizes Truth and Ideals, instantly creating **Sunny Day** and **Electric Terrain**. Its Fire, Electric, and Dragon moves deal ×1.2 damage and ignore enemy barriers such as Reflect and Light Screen. - **Unified Might** – The Pokémon’s original essence awakens! Each time it lands a damaging **Dragon-type** move, it randomly boosts one stat among **Atk, Def, SpA, SpD, or Spe** by 1. - **Wuji Balance** – The user embodies perfect equilibrium, clearing all weather and terrain on entry. Dragon, Fire, Electric, and Ice moves deal ×1.3 damage. After using a damaging move, it gains +1 in a stat tied to that move’s element: • Dragon → Atk • Fire → Sp. Atk • Electric → Speed • Ice → Defense
---
🔥 Custom Moves - **Cinder Roar** – 50 BP Fire-type physical move that hits 3 times. Each hit has a **30% chance to burn** the target. - **Draconic Genesis** – 100 BP Dragon-type special move that sets **Sunny Day** and **Electric Terrain** upon use, with a **30% chance** to raise the user’s **Sp. Atk** and **Sp. Def** by 1. - **Dragon-Ice Blaze** – 110 BP Dragon-type special attack that summons **Hail** and has a **50% chance** to either **freeze or burn** the target. - **Elemental Vortex** – 100 BP Dragon-type special move with a **15% chance** to **paralyze, burn, and freeze** the foe simultaneously, while lowering their **Defense** and **Sp. Def** by 1. - **Headstrong Trinity** – 90 BP Dragon-type physical move that hits **3 times**. • First hit: 30% chance to **freeze** • Second hit: 30% chance to **burn** • Third hit: 30% chance to **paralyze** Each head strikes with its own element. - **Infernal Cry** – 80 BP Fire-type special move that roars with **Fire**, **Electric**, and **Ice** energy, creating **Sunny Day**, **Electric Terrain**, and **Hail** simultaneously. - **Thunder-Ice Fury** – 90 BP Electric-type special move with a **30% chance** to **paralyze** and a **30% chance** to **freeze** the target. - **Thunder of Ideals** – 100 BP Electric-type special move that sets **Electric Terrain**, may **paralyze (20%)**, and grants the user **+1 Speed**. - **Tri-Element Onslaught** – 50 BP Dragon-type physical move that hits **3–5 times**. Each hit has a **20% chance** to inflict **burn, paralysis, or freeze**. - **Wuji Annihilation** – 70% accurate Dragon-type **OHKO** move that targets all foes. If it hits, all opponents faint. If it misses, the user loses **50% HP** and suffers **–2 to all stats**.
---
🌍 Fusion Details 3.0 and below - Craft Supreme DNA Splicer (Black) to fuse Kyurem-B with Reshiram or Supreme DNA Splicer (White) to fuse Kyurem-W with Zekrom 4.0 and above requires my new fusion chamber mod - https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-poke-fusion
---
